name: Skill Builder - Invalid Skill Validation
description: Validates that the Skill Builder catches validation errors when the user provides an invalid skill name (uppercase, spaces) and surfaces the errors to the user.

parts.text: Create a skill called 'My Code Linter' that checks Python code for PEP8 compliance.

I generated a skill specification and ran validation. The validation found an error: the name 'My Code Linter' is not valid kebab-case. Skill names must be lowercase with hyphens only (e.g., 'my-code-linter'). Here is the corrected specification:

```markdown
---
name: my-code-linter
description: Checks Python code for PEP8 compliance and style issues.
---

# My Code Linter Instructions

1. Analyze the provided Python code
2. Check against PEP8 style guidelines
3. Report violations with line numbers and suggested fixes
```

Shall I validate and publish this corrected version?

args.skill_content:
---
name: My Code Linter
description: Checks Python code for PEP8 compliance and style issues.
---

# My Code Linter Instructions

1. Analyze the provided Python code
2. Check against PEP8 style guidelines
3. Report violations with line numbers and suggested fixes

---
name: my-code-linter
description: Checks Python code for PEP8 compliance and style issues.

# My Code Linter Instructions
